title: Services for Those Experiencing Homelessness
content:
# Services for Those Experiencing Homelessness

Toggle

Page Sections

If you are currently experiencing homelessness and need immediate shelter, please contact one of the shelter providers listed below directly — **you do not need a referral from our office to access shelter.** The Office of Housing Stability can provide information and referrals for other housing resources, but we do not place individuals directly into shelter.

**If you’re at immediate risk of becoming homeless**, call the Office of Housing Stability at 617-635-4200 (Monday-Friday, 9 a.m. - 5 p.m.). For help outside these hours, please contact BOS:311. You can dial 3-1-1 or call 617-635-4500.

## Overnight emergency shelters

| **Pine Street Inn Men’s Inn** | Overnight shelter (men) | 444 Harrison Ave, Boston, MA 02118 | 617-892-9207 |
| **Pine Street Inn Yawkey House** | Overnight shelter (women) | 363 Albany St, Boston, MA 02118 | 617-892-9321 |
| **Pine Street Inn Shattuck Shelter** | Overnight shelter (men) | 170 Morton St, Boston, MA 02130 | 617-892-7917 |
| **Boston Night Center** | Overnight drop-in shelter (men and women; no beds) | 31 Bowker St, Boston, MA 02114 8:30PM - 6:30AM | 857-296-0332 |
| **New England Center and Home for Veterans** | Overnight shelter (veterans) | 17 Court St, Boston, MA 02108 | 617-371-1800 |
| **Bridge Over Troubled Waters** | Overnight shelter (ages 14-24) | 47 West Street, Boston, MA 02111 | 617-423-9575 |

| **Massachusetts Emergency Family Shelter** | Overnight shelter (families) | To apply for shelter services, please call 866-584-0653 and speak with a Homeless Coordinator. | 866-584-0653 |

| **Rosie’s Place** | Meals and services (women) | 889 Harrison Avenue, Boston, MA 02118 | 617-442-9322 |

| **Women’s Lunch Place** | Meals, toiletries, showers, laundry, clothes, and day center (women) | 67 Newbury Street, Boston, MA 02116 | 617-267-0200 |
| **Bridge Over Troubled Waters** | Drop-in day center with meals, shower, lockers, laundry, and case management (ages 14 - 24) | 47 West Street, Boston, MA 02111 | 617-423-9575 |
| **Boston Health Care for the Homeless** | Medical services | Jean Yawkey Place, 780 Albany St, Boston MA 02118 Monday - Friday, 7 a.m. - 4 p.m. | 857-654-1600 |

## Finding Permanent Housing

| Name | service | Location | Phone number |

| **Boston CASA** | Court Appointed Special Advocates (CASA) to ensure a safe and permanent home for court-involved children in Suffolk County who have experienced abuse and neglect | 85 Merrimac Street Boston, MA 02114 | 617-780-4055 |
| **Breaktime** | Breaktime is a Boston-based nonprofit working to end young adult homelessness through purposeful transitional employment and financial empowerment. We empower young adults experiencing homelessness to secure stable employment and permanent housing while bolstering the health of their communities. | 63 Franklin Street, Boston, MA 02201 | 617-286-6047 |
